name: Candy Bar Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Sue Klapper
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Cut candy bars in half lengthwise, then cut each length into 9 slices. Set aside.
In a large bowl, beat butter or margarine until fluffy. Add sugar and beat. Stir in flour, egg, and extracts. Chill for 3 hours, or overnight. Roll about one teaspoon of cookie dough into a ball and place on an ungreased cookie sheet. Dip thumb in flour and press an indentation in the center of each cookie. Bake for 10 minutes, or until cookies are just starting to brown at edges. Remove from oven and press one candy bar slice into each cookie. Bake about 2 minutes longer. Cool on a rack.
